MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Shirley Burns, Attorney-In-Fact for Marie Hall is present.
Attorney Dolores Chong appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Enrique Johnson is present.
Attorney Kyle Kitson representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of AUG-27-2012 is vacated.
